commit.subject: LU-0000 tests: perform performance-sanity test
commit.message:
LU-0000 tests: perform performance-sanity test

This is for test only.

Test-Parameters: fortestonly alwaysuploadlogs \
envdefinitions=SLOW=yes,ENABLE_QUOTA=yes \
mdtfilesystemtype=zfs mdsfilesystemtype=zfs ostfilesystemtype=zfs \
clientdistro=el6 ossdistro=el6 mdsdistro=el6 \
clientjob=lustre-master clientbuildno=2820 \
ossjob=lustre-master mdsjob=lustre-master ossbuildno=2820 mdsbuildno=2820 \
testlist=performance-sanity,performance-sanity

Test-Parameters: fortestonly alwaysuploadlogs \
envdefinitions=SLOW=yes,ENABLE_QUOTA=yes,PARALLEL_SCALE_EXCEPT=metabench \
mdtfilesystemtype=zfs mdsfilesystemtype=zfs ostfilesystemtype=zfs \
clientdistro=el6 ossdistro=el6 mdsdistro=el6 \
clientjob=lustre-master clientbuildno=2820 \
ossjob=lustre-master mdsjob=lustre-master ossbuildno=2820 mdsbuildno=2820 \
testlist=parallel-scale,parallel-scale

Signed-off-by: Jian Yu <jian.yu@intel.com>
Change-Id: I77dfc11554e63838d1254cb064a8267a4695460b
